# AppLixir

AppLixir is a web-first rewarded video advertising platform for HTML5 games and web apps.
Publishers earn $4–15 CPM. Users watch a short video in exchange for an in-game reward.

## SDK

Current version: v6
CDN URL: https://cdn.applixir.com/applixir.app.v6.0.1.js

DEPRECATED (do not use): applixir.sdk2.1m.js, invokeApplixirVideoUnit(), zoneId/devId/gameId params

## Integration (3 steps)

Step 1: Add div container
<div id="applixir-ad-container"></div>

Step 2: Load SDK script
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdn.applixir.com/applixir.app.v6.0.1.js"></script>

Step 3: Initialize and call on user action
const options = {
  apiKey: "YOUR-API-KEY",
  injectionElementId: "applixir-ad-container",
  adStatusCallbackFn: (status) => { /* handle status */ },
  adErrorCallbackFn: (error) => { /* handle error */ },
};
initializeAndOpenPlayer(options);

## adStatusCallbackFn Status Values

- "ad-watched" → user completed the video → GRANT REWARD
- "ad-skipped" → user skipped → do NOT grant reward
- "no-ad" → no fill available → do NOT grant reward
- "ad-started" → playback started (informational)
- "ad-loading" → fetching ad (show loading state)
- "ad-error" → error occurred → do NOT grant reward

## adErrorCallbackFn

error.getError().data contains error details.

## Application Class (advanced)

const app = new Application(options);
window.onload = () => { app.initialize(); };
// then call app.openPlayer() on user action

## Requirements

- Must be triggered by explicit user interaction (click/tap) — no autoplay
- Register your exact site URL in the AppLixir dashboard
- Add ads.txt entries from dashboard to your domain root
- Works with: HTML5, Phaser, PixiJS, Unity WebGL, Cocos, React, Vue, vanilla JS

## Unity WebGL

Use ApplixirWebGL.PlayVideo(callback). Positive result: PlayVideoResult.ADWatched.

## Server-Side Callback (optional)

Configure in dashboard → Callbacks. AppLixir POSTs signed HTTPS request to your endpoint on reward.

## Links

Sign up: https://client.applixir.com/register
Dashboard: https://client.applixir.com
Documentation: https://support.applixir.com
Integration examples: https://github.com/applixirinc/applixir-integration
Support: support@applixir.com
